name: RHEEM.COM
message: [AI generated] Rheem Manufacturing Company is a leading global manufacturer of heating, cooling, water heating, and pool/spa heating solutions. It is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, USA. Since it's founded in 1925, Rheem has aimed to help people improve their comforts at home and at various business establishments. This widely recognized corporation offers advanced, energy-efficient options and diversified its product lineup to meet varying consumer needs.
